Text: Please prepare ENTER_PO for pick up with the BOL attached to the freight and wait 2 business days for the pick up to happen. If the pick up is not completed within that time you may reopen this ticket on ENTER_DATE and we will investigate this pickup for you further.

Please do not re-register a PO after we have completed a carrier change as this will remove the new carrier and the PO will revert back to the original carrier. OR Please do not re-register the above PO as this will cause a new pick up date to generate and cause further delay. If the pick up is not completed within 2 business days please reopen this ticket on ENTER_DATE and we will be happy to look into this further.
For any additional pick up requests, please contact your locally assigned Wayfair Transportation Planners via email.

Template Use Case/Title: PO Marked Shipped Education/Replaced PO/ Blind Shipment
Text: Please do not attempt to have this picked up under the original PO as this will cause a blind shipment which is unable to be tracked in Wayfair's system and may become lost. OR Please do not attempt to have this picked up under the original PO as this will cause a blind shipment which is unable to be tracked in Wayfair's system and may become lost. If the original PO is shipped you will need to start a claims process to get this back to you. We are not able to help with this return process. OR Please do not ship this product as it will become a blind shipment which is not trackable in our system and will have a high possibility of being lost. If you have further questions or concerns please let us know.
You can view your pickup schedule using the Supplier Pickup Center in the link below. https://partners.wayfair.com/transportation/pickup_center/calendar/
